'''Deel De''' was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]][[Force-sensitive/Legends|-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. Born to a [[Noble/Legends|noble]] family on her homeworld, she grew up privileged and pampered. However, it soon became obvious to her parents that she was strong with the Force, and they kept her powers secret for fear of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] taking their only child.

When she became an adult, Deel roamed [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and discovered her true calling after talking to [[Keroth Ishedur]]: the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Afterwards, she to married [[Larith De]] so that she had a respectable cover for her shady activities.
